reasoning: The likelihood of Donald and Melania Trump announcing a divorce by the end of 2025 is extremely low. US presidents practically never divorce while in office. For decades, throughout various scandals, trials, and campaigns, they have stayed married. While 2025 reports (like Michael Wolff's claims) suggest they lead separate lives and reside separately most of the time, this informal separation arrangement seems to function well for them politically and personally, removing any incentive for an official, headline-dominating divorce announcement. Fact-checkers routinely debunk false rumors and clickbait asserting an imminent divorce. Given that it is already November 2025, the odds of an official divorce announcement in the final seven weeks of the year are practically zero.
